next_steps: Complete first-run signup in the browser — first user becomes admin (no vault admin password).
Allow 1–2 minutes after deploy for DB migrations; verify GET /healthz before opening the UI.
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/twenty-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
For HTTPS: set twenty.public_url before first login, add BIND A record, nginx-waf site upstream http://<ct-ip>:3000.
For LAN-only: omit public_url; browse http://<ct-ip>:3000.
Keep worker running for background jobs; backup HDC_TWENTY_ENCRYPTION_KEY and HDC_TWENTY_DB_PASSWORD with Postgres volume (database name default).
Optional: configure SMTP/OAuth/S3 in Twenty Admin Panel after deploy.
